task_name: Apache Error Log - Identify Critical Security Issues
notes: Excellent execution. Agent correctly identified: (1) Two critical exploitation attempts (Unicode-encoded directory traversal to cmd.exe from 12 IPs; Code Red II root.exe backdoor probes from 10 IPs) with proper CVE context; (2) AWStats RCE scanning from 202.133.98.6 (~115 hits, high severity); (3) OpenWebMail, FrontPage/_vti_bin, overlong-URI buffer overflow, and directory probing attacks; (4) Eight distinct security categories total; (5) Proper severity hierarchy (critical→high→medium). JSON format fully compliant with required fields (severity, category, source_ips, evidence, sample_entry). Evidence descriptions are thorough and justify classifications. Minor: created two identical output files, but main deliverable is correct and complete.
